name: host-info-in-config
description: Contains the list of hostnames available for protection and its details.

availableSet.description: The available hosts set for the current user.

items.description: Contains details about the hostname and its status.

activeInProduction.description: Whether the hostname is active in the production network.

activeInStaging.description: Whether the hostname is active in the staging network.

arlInclusion.description: Whether the hostname is Akamai Resource Locator (ARL) included.

configIdInProduction.description: Uniquely identifies the configuration that protects the hostname.

configNameInProduction.description: The name of the configuration that protects the hostname.

errorSet.description: The requested hosts aren't available in this configuration version.

hostname.description: The hostname that triggers an error.

reason.description: The reason why the hosts aren't protectable in this configuration version.

reasonCode.description: The error status code for the hostname.

protectARLInclusionHost.description: Whether the host defined in the ARL file has legacy WAF enabled in the configuration.

selectedSet.description: The selected set of hostnames in this configuration version.

items.description: Contains details about the hostname and its status.

activeInProduction.description: Whether the hostname is active in the production network.

activeInStaging.description: Whether the hostname is active in the staging network.

arlInclusion.description: Whether the hostname is Akamai Resource Locator (ARL) included.

configIdInProduction.description: Uniquely identifies the configuration that protects the hostname.

configNameInProduction.description: The name of the configuration that protects the hostname.
